summary: Round 2 confirms round 1 fixes landed cleanly. The one-tick-lag contract is now explicitly asserted in Test_readMeta_with_sysinfo (items[0].meta.ticks == 0, items[0].meta.cpuCount == 0). Test_emitProcPidStatAvailabilityWarnings adds 6 sub-cases isolating each WARNING branch. No regressions: go build clean, go vet clean, gofmt clean on changed files, go test ./report/... still 16/16 (with 6 new sub-tests). The two minor suggestions deferred from round 1 (test sysinfo→meta→stat ordering; export column-index constants from internal/stat) remain out of scope by design — both are noted in decisions.md as follow-up candidates rather than blockers.

metrics.deferredJustification: Both deferred items are optional follow-ups (column constants centralization, defensive ordering test). Neither blocks acceptance criteria; both noted in decisions.md.
